name: Mini Cart Icon Click
description: 1. Launch browser → Amazon SG. 2. Add product to cart. 3. Click cart icon (id="nav-cart"). 4. Validate cart page loads. 5. Close browser.

analysis.phase1Message: expect.toBeVisible: Error: strict mode violation: getByRole('button', { name: /Add to Cart/i }) resolved to 2 elements: 1) aka getByLabel('Add to cart, shift, Alt, K') 2) aka getByLabel('Add to cart', { exact: true }) Call log: [2m- expect.toBeVisible with timeout 15000ms[22m [2m - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /Add to Cart/i })[22m ",
analysis.recommendation: ⚠️  Fix Phase 1 issues before saving as golden
